creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
After doing some tests and study the postfix history I notice postfix has build in support for Dovecot SASL and if build direct from source (clean env.) Dovecot SASL is enabled by default.

At the moment I'm rewriting the postfix ports so Dovecot SASL will be always supported, Cyrus will be additional/optional.

Additional I'm planing to make postfix-current the new default postfix in the next weeks, some features will maybe be lost since there are no new patches for postfix 3.x e.g. VDA and native SPF so I assume those projects are no longer active.
